series_metadata.series_title: Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee Application/Agreement
series_metadata.series_description: File contains all Cancelled Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee materials, all application forms, correspondence, and related material.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain copy in a secure area with access limited only to persons who need the records to carry out their duties and responsibilities for two (2) years after Video Lottery Terminal Key Gaming Employee cancellation date, review administrative value, then destroy., Paper: Shred
